creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: araujo
Date: Mon Feb  4 08:46:02 2013
New Revision: 311579
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/311579

Log:
  - Update to version 1.2.1.1.
  
  PR:		ports/174195
  Submitted by:	KATO Tsuguru <tkato432@yahoo.com>

Modified:
  head/multimedia/vstream-client/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/multimedia/vstream-client/distinfo   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/multimedia/vstream-client/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/vstream-client/Makefile	Mon Feb  4 08:44:28 2013	(r311578)
+++ head/multimedia/vstream-client/Makefile	Mon Feb  4 08:46:02 2013	(r311579)
@@ -1,25 +1,28 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:    vstream-client
-# Date created:				2005-10-06
-# Whom:					Frank Mayhar <frank@exit.com>
-#
+# Created by: Frank Mayhar <frank@exit.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	vstream-client
-PORTVERSION=	1.2
+PORTVERSION=	1.2.1.1
 CATEGORIES=	multimedia
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
 
 MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	The vstream library from the tivo-mplayer project
+COMMENT=	Client library for the Tivo vstream server
 
-USE_BZIP2=	yes
+LICENSE=	GPLv2
 
+USE_BZIP2=	yes
 HAS_CONFIGURE=	yes
 CONFIGURE_ARGS=	--prefix=${PREFIX}
+MAKE_JOBS_SAFE=	yes
 
 PLIST_FILES=	bin/vstream-client \
-		lib/libvstream-client.a \
-		include/vstream-client.h
+		include/vstream-client.h \
+		lib/libvstream-client.a
+
+post-patch:
+	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e \
+		's|$$(INSTALL) -m 755|$${BSD_INSTALL_PROGRAM}| ; \
+		 s|$$(INSTALL) -m 644|$${BSD_INSTALL_DATA}|' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/multimedia/vstream-client/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/multimedia/vstream-client/distinfo	Mon Feb  4 08:44:28 2013	(r311578)
+++ head/multimedia/vstream-client/distinfo	Mon Feb  4 08:46:02 2013	(r311579)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (vstream-client-1.2.tar.bz2) = 07daac73fffc6c4bc6518cfc80df38b47a23f2b15d9f85b643c0a58c3ae0babc
-SIZE (vstream-client-1.2.tar.bz2) = 28132
+SHA256 (vstream-client-1.2.1.1.tar.bz2) = caf3058b0afc0e8c01d752abf7a115a9b647fac1c6e9190a9aae8f79d4dcf09b
+SIZE (vstream-client-1.2.1.1.tar.bz2) = 36390
